text_preview:
SCADA Standards Appendix A 
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Howard F. Curren AWTP 
SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
143
artifact_summary: Appendix A of the HFC AWTP Master Plan defining graphical standards for monitoring pressure, flow, level, and pump discharge.
artifact_blurb: This document serves as Appendix A within the HFC AWTP Master Plan, establishing mandatory SCADA interface standards. It provides visual references and specific formatting rules for monitoring critical hydraulic parameters, including pressure, flow, level, and pump discharge readouts, ensuring consistency across the system's graphical user interface.

It provides visual references and specific formatting rules for monitoring critical hydraulic parameters, including pressure, flow, level, and pump discharge readouts, ensuring consistency across the system's graphical user interface.
